# Punto Reforma

> Architecture and total renovations in Madrid — for homes, apartments and commercial spaces. Custom carpentry, prime kitchens and bathrooms, project management and permits, from first idea to handover. One responsible contact throughout.

> Arquitectura de interiores y reformas integrales en Madrid — para viviendas, pisos y locales comerciales. Carpintería a medida, cocinas y baños prime, coordinación de obra y gestión de permisos, desde la primera idea hasta la entrega. Un solo interlocutor responsable durante todo el proceso.

Brand: Punto Reforma (one-word wordmark: Puntoreforma). This site is Punto Reforma Madrid, the main site.

## Contact

- Website: https://puntoreforma.es/
- Email: info@puntoreforma.es
- Phone: +34 910 726 73
- Location: Madrid, Spain

## Services

- Reforma integral & gestión de obra — complete renovations for homes, apartments and commercial spaces, from first concept to handover
- Arquitectura & diseño — architecture, layout, material direction and design decisions for renovation projects
- Cocinas & baños prime — kitchens and bathrooms designed as central parts of the renovation
- Carpintería a medida & metal — bespoke wardrobes, storage, built-ins, furniture and custom metal constructions
- Comprobaciones técnicas & permisos — technical checks, permit coordination and engineer procedures

## Pages

- [Home](https://puntoreforma.es/): Services, process, gallery and contact form
- [Blog](https://puntoreforma.es/blog/): Renovation guides and articles for Madrid
- [Cities / Ciudades](https://puntoreforma.es/ciudades/): Service areas
- [Partners / Colaboradores](https://puntoreforma.es/partners/): Collaborating professionals

## Blog Articles

- [Carpintería a medida en Madrid](https://puntoreforma.es/blog/carpinteria-a-medida-madrid/): Custom carpentry in Madrid: built-in wardrobes, shelving, hallways, bathrooms, kitchens and integrated storage solutions.
- [Pintura en Madrid: color y acabados](https://puntoreforma.es/blog/pintura-madrid-color-acabados/): How to plan painting work in Madrid: surface preparation, colour choices, finishes, timelines and common mistakes to avoid.
- [Reforma de baño en comunidad Madrid](https://puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-bano-comunidad-madrid/): What to check with your building community before renovating a bathroom in Madrid: utilities, permits and documentation.
- [Reforma de baño en Madrid: checklist](https://puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-bano-madrid-checklist/): Practical checklist for renovating a bathroom in Madrid: budget, permits, community rules, materials, timelines and trade coordination.
- [Reformas de baño en Madrid: precios](https://puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-bano-madrid-precio/): Price ranges for bathroom renovation in Madrid: what raises costs, permits, community fees, VAT and tax deductions in Spain.
- [Reforma de cocina en Madrid: planificación](https://puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-cocina-madrid-planificacion/): How to plan a kitchen renovation in Madrid: layout, utilities, materials, timelines and realistic budgets. Expert guide.
- [Reformas de cocina en Madrid: precios](https://puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-cocina-madrid-precio/): Kitchen renovation prices in Madrid: facelift vs full remodel, custom carpentry, utilities, VAT and how to budget realistically.
- [Reforma integral en Madrid: precio y proceso](https://puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-integral-madrid-precio/): What a full renovation in Madrid includes: price by scope, phases, permits and complete project coordination.
- [Reforma de piso en Madrid: coste y plazos](https://puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-piso-madrid/): Guide to renovating a flat in Madrid: budget, phases, building community, permits, technical documentation and coordination.
